briefdescription.para: Maximum number of counter (static) and size of the tables in Stat_Internals.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::stringstream &lines, const std::vector< std::string > &line_items, const std::vector< int > &item_size)
memberdef.name: build_line_csv

inbodydescription.para: < Ensure that each item of a column has the same size
< if end_line == True, then add a break line but no delimiter
< Put the column delimiter if we are not at the end of the line
